questions.question: The principal value branch of sin⁻¹x is:
questions.explanation: The principal value branch of the inverse sine function is defined as the interval [-π/2, π/2].
questions.subject: Mathematics

questions.question: The value of cos⁻¹(cos 7π/6) is:
questions.explanation: Since 7π/6 is outside [0, π], we use cos(7π/6) = cos(2π - 7π/6) = cos(5π/6). Thus cos⁻¹(cos 5π/6) = 5π/6.
questions.subject: Mathematics

questions.question: The domain of cos⁻¹x is:
questions.explanation: The domain of both sin⁻¹x and cos⁻¹x is the interval [-1, 1].
questions.subject: Mathematics
